title: From 1957: Gabriela Mistral, Poet, Is Dead; Won Nobel Prize for Literature
summary_full: She was recognized in 1945 for three “Soñetos de la Muerte” (“Sonnets of Death”), which were first published in Chile in 1922.
summary_public: She was recognized in 1945 for three “Soñetos de la Muerte” (“Sonnets of Death”), which were first published in Chile in 1922.
